name: Klaimee
oneliner: Certifies and insures autonomous AI agents — audits agents for safety and backs them with AI-native liability coverage. Self-serve from day one.
team: Self-serve agent certification and insurance platform.
finserv: No explicit finserv focus. Certification model transfers to regulated agent marketplace.
thesis: Klaimee complements Mount in the agent liability space but takes a self-serve, developer-first approach — certify and insure agents from day one. The certification-first model could become the standard trust badge that agent marketplaces require before listing financial agents. Lower finserv signal than Mount, but the self-serve model scales faster if the certification standard gains adoption.
